---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/site-stats.R")
```

::: {.page-band}
[02 — About]{.label}

::: {.h1}
Bridging disciplines, seeing the system
:::
:::

::: {.split-bio}

::: {}
I'm a researcher at the University of Nottingham's Rights Lab, working on how climate change, supply chains, and modern slavery connect. My day-to-day involves a mix of quantitative methods: climate modelling, network analysis, supply-chain mapping, and life cycle assessment. I've applied these across quite different industries, from food systems and solar panels to brick kilns.

I got here by a roundabout path. I trained as an Industrial Engineer and spent my early career as a business consultant, mostly building dashboards and performance metrics. Somewhere along the way I started asking what we were actually measuring, and whether profit was the right scorecard. That question pulled me toward sustainability research, and I've stayed there.

The part I enjoy most is making technical findings legible to people outside the field. A good chart or map can open up a conversation that a 40-page report won't. 

::: {.methods-box}

[Research Methods & Approaches]{.label}

::: {.tag-row}
[Social Life Cycle Assessment](projects.html){.tag}
[Secondary Data Analysis](projects.html){.tag}
[Climate Modelling](projects.html#Climate%20Modelling){.tag}
[Risk assessment](projects.html#Risk%20Assessment){.tag}
[Societal Metabolism](projects.html){.tag}
[Complex Network Analysis](projects.html){.tag}
[Material Flow Analysis](projects.html){.tag}
[Supply Chain Mapping](projects.html#Supply%20Chains){.tag}

:::
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
render_stats_strip()
```
:::

::: {}
![Edgar Rodríguez-Huerta](assets/images/Rodriguez.jpeg){.profile-photo}

[Current Position]{.label}

::: {.position-block}
Rights Lab Senior Research Fellow in Social Sustainability and Complex Systems

[Rights Lab, University of Nottingham](https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/research/beacons-of-excellence/rights-lab/our-team/edgar-rodr%c3%adguez-huerta/index.aspx){.body-sm target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::

[Contact & Profiles]{.label}

::: {.contact-list}
<a href="mailto:edgar.rodriguezhuerta@nottingham.ac.uk" class="contact-item"><svg class="ci-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--icon-color)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M2 7l10 7 10-7"/></svg><div><div class="ci-label">Email</div><div class="ci-sub">edgar.rodriguezhuerta@nottingham.ac.uk</div></div></a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/edgarodriguez/" class="contact-item" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg class="ci-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--icon-color)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="3"/><line x1="8" y1="11" x2="8" y2="17"/><line x1="8" y1="7" x2="8" y2="8"/><path d="M12 17v-4c0-1.1.9-2 2-2s2 .9 2 2v4"/><line x1="12" y1="11" x2="12" y2="17"/></svg><div><div class="ci-label">LinkedIn</div><div class="ci-sub">linkedin.com/in/edgarodriguez</div></div></a>
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=f0cb5QkAAAAJ&hl" class="contact-item" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg class="ci-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--icon-color)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5z"/><path d="M2 17l10 5 10-5"/><path d="M2 12l10 5 10-5"/></svg><div><div class="ci-label">Google Scholar</div><div class="ci-sub">Rodriguez-Huerta, E.</div></div></a>
<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6887-0040" class="contact-item" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg class="ci-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--icon-color)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><circle cx="8.5" cy="8" r="0.8" fill="var(--icon-color)" stroke="none"/><line x1="8.5" y1="10.5" x2="8.5" y2="16.5"/><path d="M11 8.5h2a4 4 0 0 1 0 8H11z"/></svg><div><div class="ci-label">ORCID</div><div class="ci-sub">0000-0002-6887-0040</div></div></a>
<a href="https://github.com/edgarodriguez" class="contact-item" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg class="ci-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--icon-color)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/></svg><div><div class="ci-label">GitHub</div><div class="ci-sub">@edgarodriguez</div></div></a><!-- end -->
:::
:::

:::
